title: Search and return match data from all CSV files
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data.clj:81-92 — load-all-data! loads all 6 CSV files (brasileirao, copa-brasil, libertadores, br-football, historico, fifa); all-matches:163-172 merges them

title: Search and return player data
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data.clj:318-349 — search-players function; src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/tools.clj:59-68 — search_players tool with FIFA database integration

title: Calculate basic statistics (wins, losses, goals)
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data.clj:245-271 — team-stats function; 353-373 — global-stats function; tools.clj:119-138 format team stats output

title: Compare teams head-to-head
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data.clj:207-241 — head-to-head and head-to-head-stats functions; tools.clj:102-117 — get_head_to_head tool

title: Handle team name variations correctly
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data.clj:21-36 — normalize-team-name and normalize-for-search handle state suffixes, accents, case-insensitive matching

title: Return properly formatted responses
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/tools.clj:7-24 — fmt-match and fmt-player format helper functions; all tool methods use consistent formatting

title: MCP protocol support (initialize, tools/list, tools/call)
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/core.clj:40-71 — handle-request implements initialize, tools/list, tools/call, notifications/initialized

title: League standings calculation
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data.clj:280-288 — competition-standings function computes league table sorted by points and goal difference; tools.clj:140-156 — get_standings tool

title: Biggest wins/victories analysis
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data.clj:292-299 — biggest-wins function sorts by goal difference; tools.clj:172-186 — get_biggest_wins tool

title: All 6 CSV files loadable and queryable
evidence: data/kaggle/ contains all 6 required files; data.clj:86-91 loads each file separately; test/brazilian_soccer_mcp/core_test.clj:58-76 verifies all files load with >1000 records

title: All 24 unit tests pass
evidence: Test run output: 24 tests, 70 assertions, 0 failures, 0 errors

title: No skipped or disabled tests
evidence: Grep for skip/pending/disabled across test/ returns no matches; all tests executed

title: Clojure project builds successfully
evidence: clojure -M:test completes with exit code 0; no compilation errors

title: Cross-file queries supported
evidence: data.clj:all-matches merges data from all CSV sources; tools support team/player queries across multiple competitions and datasets
